Off Calendar Jun-08-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS KRONENBERGER ROSENFELD, LLP, KARL KRONENBERGER and JEFFREY ROSENFELD'S Motion To Consolidate this case with case 557596 is GRANTED. The two cases are consolidated for all purposes. Case 550648 is the lead case and all further filings must be in the lead case only. The trial date of December 4, 2017 set in this case now applies to the consolidated cases. If Successfulmatch appeals the denial of its motion to compel arbitration in case 557596, any stay of case 557596 will also serve to stay case 550648. Successfulmatch appears to recognize that the two cases are based on a common set of facts and that consolidation fosters judicial economy and minimizes the possibility of inconsistent rulings. Successfulmatch opposes this motion only on the grounds that it believes: 1) its motion to compel arbitration in case 557596 should be granted and 2) the same counsel should not represent the Kronenberger firm and Ms. Sanderson. The denial of Successfulmatch's motion to compel arbitration resolves Successfulmatch's first argument. Successfulmatch's second argument is not a reason to deny consolidation. If there is a conflict of interest precluding the same attorney or law firm from representing the Kronenberger firm and Ms. Sanderson, that attorney or law firm should not represent both the Kronenberger firm and Ms. Sanderson whether or not the cases are consolidated. The conflict of interest issue is best addressed, if at all, in a motion to disqualify counsel, but, even there, it is questionable whether Successfulmatch has standing to raise the issue. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/hk
